mapper.select: select qf.*, q.content as question_content, q.type as question_type, q.answer as question_answer, q.analysis as question_analysis, q.difficulty as question_difficulty, q.score as question_score, q.options as question_options from `question_favorite` qf left join `question` q on qf.question_id = q.id where qf.user_id = #{userId} and qf.user_role = #{userRole} order by qf.created_at desc
